title: CRSS Mod
body:
# CRSS Mod
This is the Server Mod used in the [CRSS](https://crss.blurryface.xyz) server.
It features an unpatch to 1.14's armor glitch and other functionality.
## How can I use it?
Place the jar inside your ``mods`` folder on any compatible Fabric version. It should be compatible with versions foward from the main version, but probably won't work on older ones.
## What is CRSS?
CRSS is a server ran by [Blurryface](https://blurry.gay), hosted by [TheClashFruit](https://theclashfruit.me) which runs on older versions of Minecraft, updating every first day of every month. Previously, it was weekly updates. We started on ``beta 1.0`` and we are currently on ``release 1.14.4``. <!-- the previous edit was 1.5.2... wow. -->

You can take a look at our latest YouTube video here:
